purpose: Probes TRIAGE discipline when the user names no library. The skill should refuse to guess and instead run cross-cutting triage first.
prompt: Our reactor service is leaking sockets. FDs went from 800 to 3500 over the last 12 hours. We have kubectl exec access. JVM, Spring Boot. What do I do?
expected_behavior: Does NOT immediately propose a library-specific fix
Runs TRIAGE step 2 (FD classification) to identify the resource class
Runs TRIAGE step 2b (top remote endpoints) to disambiguate per-request vs per-client
Captures the slope baseline (~225 FDs/hour) before routing
Only after triage produces a signature does it route to a domain reference
